sp_widget.description: Generates instance-specific curl commands for SNU1024 lab exercises (Labs 1-9). Provides Mac/Windows command variants with copy-to-clipboard and in-browser API test execution via RESTMessageV2 loopback.
sp_widget.name: Vehicles API Tests
sp_widget.template:
Vehicles API Tests

Instance: {{c.instanceId}}

OAuth Credentials

Labs 5-9 require OAuth tokens. Enter your client credentials from the OAuth Application Registry below. These values are stored in your browser session only.

vehicle.integration

vehicle.integration_admin

Lab {{lab.num}}: {{lab.title}}

Test {{test.id}} {{test.description}} {{test.method}}
zsh PowerShell 
{{c.getCommand(test)}}
Executes from the instance (loopback) — use curl for the actual exercise
{{test.result.error ? 'ERROR' : 'HTTP ' + test.result.status}} 
{{test.result.body}}
